requirement_topic.en: EEA CE Market Screening and EMC/Radio Scope
requirement_topic.zh: EEA CE 市场筛查与 EMC/无线范围
requirement_topic.zht: EEA CE 市場篩查與 EMC/無線範圍

summary.en: For Iceland-facing PV inverters, CE-equivalent conformance screening should cover Directive 2014/35/EU LVD where the voltage scope applies, Directive 2014/30/EU EMC for emissions and immunity, and Directive 2014/53/EU RED where wireless monitoring or communication modules are integrated. Market placement is model-based and route-based by function.
summary.zh: 面向冰岛的光伏逆变器应按型号和功能进行 CE 等同合规筛查：在适用电压范围内覆盖 2014/35/EU 低电压指令，在电磁兼容方面覆盖 2014/30/EU EMC 指令，在集成无线监控或通信模块时覆盖 2014/53/EU RED。
summary.zht: 面向冰島的太陽能逆變器應按型號和功能進行 CE 等同合規篩查：在適用電壓範圍內覆蓋 2014/35/EU 低電壓指令，在電磁兼容方面覆蓋 2014/30/EU EMC 指令，在集成無線監控或通訊模組時覆蓋 2014/53/EU RED。

summary.en: China inverter evidence often includes GB/T 37408 and grid-code records that can support technical design review. However, GB/T evidence is not a direct substitute for Iceland market-placement scope analysis under EEA-aligned LVD, EMC, or RED.
summary.zh: 中国逆变器证据通常包括 GB/T 37408 和并网记录，可支持技术设计审核，但并非 EEA 对齐的 LVD、EMC、RED 冰岛上市范围分析的直接替代。
summary.zht: 中國逆變器證據通常包括 GB/T 37408 和併網記錄，可支援技術設計審核，但並非 EEA 對齊的 LVD、EMC、RED 冰島上市範圍分析的直接替代。

standards_or_laws: China grid-coupled compliance evidence where available

gap.en: The gap is often the scope matrix, not only electrical performance. Exporters should map each model to LVD, EMC, and RED applicability, plus marking, DoC wording, importer responsibilities, warnings, and documentation language requirements.
gap.zh: 差距通常在于范围矩阵，而不仅是电气性能。出口商应将每个型号映射到 LVD、EMC、RED 的适用性，并补齐标识、符合性声明、进口商责任、警示和文件语种要求。
gap.zht: 差距通常在於範圍矩陣，而不僅是電氣性能。出口商應將每個型號映射到 LVD、EMC、RED 的適用性，並補齊標識、符合性聲明、進口商責任、警示和文件語種要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the model is within EU-directive scopes by EEA alignment; RED only applies where radio communication modules are present
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China GB/T records do not complete EEA CE market-placement scope obligations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume a broad CE outcome from China inverter GB/T files alone. Iceland-facing market placement needs explicit per-model EU-directive scope mapping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国逆变器 GB/T 文件认定广泛 CE 结果。面向冰岛上市需按每个型号进行欧盟指令范围逐一映射。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國逆變器 GB/T 文件認定廣泛 CE 結果。面向冰島上市需按每個型號進行歐盟指令範圍逐一映射。
